since_last: 21% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.23%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 21% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.51% · BTC -0.85% · Gold -1.59% · Nasdaq100 -1.62%. 21% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.23%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.23%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.11%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -11.31%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +5.96%, INTU +5.26%, ZBRA +5.03%, ADBE +3.91%, IBM +3.72%. Laggards: SKHY -11.31%, MRVL -8.65%, OKLO -8.52%, CRNC -8.21%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.12% at $132.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.12% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
